meta.description: Digital portal for municipal registry services. Request certificates and documents online.

footer.copy: Comune. Prototype developed for academic research.

home.title: Services — Sportello Demografico
home.heading: Citizen Services
home.intro: Welcome to the Sportello Demografico digital portal. Browse and request official registry documents online.

residency-certificate.title: Residency Certificate
residency-certificate.description: Request a certified document confirming your registered address. Required for many administrative procedures.

detail.description: A residency certificate is an official document issued by your municipality confirming your registered address. It is commonly requested by employers, banks, courts, and public offices.
detail.cost: Free of charge (standard use); €0.16 stamp duty may apply for legal use.
detail.howToApply: Complete the contact form with your personal details and the reason for your request. You will receive the document as a certified PDF within the stated processing time.
docs: Valid identity document (national ID card or passport)

family-status.title: Family Status Certificate
family-status.description: Obtain a certified record of your household composition. Needed for schools, courts and public offices.

detail.description: A family status certificate documents the composition of your household as recorded in the municipal registry. It is required for school enrolments, court procedures and applications to public bodies.
detail.cost: Free of charge for personal use. €0.16 stamp duty for administrative/legal use.
detail.howToApply: Submit your request using the contact form. Please specify in the Message field the intended use of the document so we can apply the correct stamp-duty exemption.
docs: Valid identity document of the requesting person
Tax codes of all household members (if available)

identity-card.title: Identity Card Application
identity-card.description: Apply for a new Italian identity card or renew your existing one. Appointment required at the local office.

detail.description: The electronic identity card (CIE) is the official ID document issued by the municipality. You can apply for one for the first time or renew it when it expires. This service requires an in-person appointment.
detail.processingTime: Issued immediately at the office during your appointment
detail.cost: €22.21 for first issue or standard renewal; €27.77 for lost or damaged cards.
detail.howToApply: Book an appointment by calling the registry office or via the CIEonline portal. Attend the appointment with the required documents.
docs: Expired or damaged identity card (if renewing)
One recent passport-size photo on a white background

notFound.title: Service not found
notFound.message: The requested service does not exist or is no longer available.

contact.title: Contact — Sportello Demografico
contact.heading: Submit a request
contact.intro: Fill in the form below to request a document or send an enquiry. Fields marked with * are required.

email.label: Email address
email.hint: We will send confirmation and the document to this address.

message.label: Message
message.hint: Describe your request in detail. Minimum 20 characters, maximum 1 000.

privacy.label: I have read and accept the
privacy.labelSuffix: and consent to the processing of my personal data.

errors.count: There are {{count}} error(s) in this form

success.title: Request submitted successfully
success.message: Thank you. We will process your request and reply within the stated processing time.

errors.email: Enter a valid email address (e.g. name@example.com).
errors.invalidPhone: Enter a valid Italian phone number (e.g. +39 333 1234567 or 02 1234567).
